detectors.description:
Reentrancy in DragonKyla._transfer(address,address,uint256) (DragonKyla.sol#643-767):
	External calls:
	- swapTokensForEth(contractTokenBalance) (DragonKyla.sol#707)
		- uniswapV2Router.swapExactTokensForETHSupportingFeeOnTransferTokens(tokenAmount,0,path,address(this),block.timestamp) (DragonKyla.sol#781-793)
	External calls sending eth:
	- sendETHToFee(address(this).balance) (DragonKyla.sol#713)
		- _marketingAddress.transfer(amount) (DragonKyla.sol#801)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee) (DragonKyla.sol#765)
		- _rOwned[address(this)] = _rOwned[address(this)].add(rTeam) (DragonKyla.sol#927)
		- _rOwned[sender] = _rOwned[sender].sub(rAmount) (DragonKyla.sol#907)
		- _rOwned[recipient] = _rOwned[recipient].add(rTransferAmount) (DragonKyla.sol#909)
	DragonKyla._rOwned (DragonKyla.sol#319) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- DragonKyla._takeTeam(uint256) (DragonKyla.sol#921-929)
	- DragonKyla._transferStandard(address,address,uint256) (DragonKyla.sol#881-917)
	- DragonKyla.balanceOf(address) (DragonKyla.sol#469-473)
	- DragonKyla.constructor() (DragonKyla.sol#403-433)
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee) (DragonKyla.sol#765)
		- _rTotal = _rTotal.sub(rFee) (DragonKyla.sol#935)
	DragonKyla._rTotal (DragonKyla.sol#331) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- DragonKyla._getCurrentSupply() (DragonKyla.sol#1077-1087)
	- DragonKyla._reflectFee(uint256,uint256) (DragonKyla.sol#933-939)
	- DragonKyla.constructor() (DragonKyla.sol#403-433)
	- DragonKyla.tokenFromReflection(uint256) (DragonKyla.sol#565-587)
